name: life-os
description: A personal Progressive Web App for discipline, progress, and growth. Built as a single-page app deployed via GitHub Pages with GitHub Actions.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html app.js sw.js manifest.json offline.html dist/ && cp -r icons dist/ && xattr -rc dist || true
scripts.dev:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios --target AB2BA6C0-DF31-4A2A-8ABE-6F99E18D5DEE
scripts.dev:ipad: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios --target 7D767D23-7754-4595-A947-645224F70446
